name: PCI DSS v4.0.1 — Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard

controls.title: NSC policies and procedures defined
controls.description: Network security controls (NSC) policies and procedures are defined, implemented, and maintained — including documented standards, change control, and review.

controls.title: NSC configurations restrict traffic
controls.description: NSC configurations restrict traffic to/from the CDE to only what is necessary, with deny-all default and documented business justification for allowed ports/services.

controls.title: Current network and data flow diagrams
controls.description: Network diagrams and data flow diagrams are current, accurate, and document CDE boundaries and all account data flows.

controls.title: Inbound and outbound CDE traffic restricted
controls.description: Inbound and outbound network traffic to/from the CDE is restricted to only that necessary, with egress filtering and explicit rule documentation.

controls.title: Trusted/untrusted network connections controlled
controls.description: Network connections between trusted and untrusted networks are controlled with DMZ architecture, stateful inspection, anti-spoofing, and NAT.

controls.title: Vendor defaults and security parameters managed
controls.description: Processes for managing vendor defaults and other security parameters are documented and applied to all system components.

controls.title: System configuration standards developed
controls.description: System configuration standards are developed for all system components (CIS Benchmarks or equivalent) and applied before deployment.

controls.title: Vendor default accounts managed
controls.description: Vendor default accounts are managed (disabled, renamed, or password changed) before deploying systems to production.

controls.title: Non-console admin access encrypted
controls.description: All non-console administrative access is encrypted using strong cryptography (SSH, HTTPS, TLS).

controls.title: Account data storage minimized
controls.description: Account data storage is minimized; retention and disposal policies are defined and enforced; data is purged when no longer needed.

controls.title: SAD not retained after authorization
controls.description: Sensitive authentication data (SAD) — full magnetic stripe, CAV2/CVV2/CVC2/CID, PIN/PIN block — is not retained after authorization. If stored pre-authorization, it is encrypted.

controls.title: PAN protected wherever stored
controls.description: PAN is rendered unreadable wherever it is stored — using strong cryptography, truncation, tokenization, or hashing.

controls.title: PAN secured with strong cryptography
controls.description: PAN is secured with strong cryptography (AES-256 or equivalent), with no use of deprecated algorithms (DES, RC4, MD5 for integrity).

controls.title: Cryptographic keys secured
controls.description: Cryptographic keys used for PAN encryption are secured with key management procedures covering generation, distribution, storage, rotation, and retirement.

controls.title: Key management procedures implemented
controls.description: Key management procedures and processes are implemented — split knowledge, dual control, key-encrypting keys, compromise procedures, custodian responsibilities.

controls.title: PAN-in-transit protection processes defined
controls.description: Processes for protecting PAN with strong cryptography during transmission over open, public networks are defined and implemented.

controls.title: PAN encrypted in transit on open networks
controls.description: PAN is protected during transmission over open, public networks using TLS 1.2+ (no SSL, TLS 1.0/1.1). Certificate inventory is maintained.

controls.title: Anti-malware deployed on applicable systems
controls.description: Anti-malware solution(s) are deployed on all system components subject to malware risk, with detection of all known malware types.

controls.title: Anti-malware maintained and monitored
controls.description: Anti-malware solution is kept current (auto-update), performs periodic and real-time scans, logs results, and cannot be disabled by end users.

controls.title: Anti-phishing technical controls
controls.description: Automated technical solutions detect and protect against phishing attacks (new in v4.0). Includes email gateway filtering, URL filtering, DMARC/DKIM/SPF.

controls.title: Secure software development practices
controls.description: Bespoke and custom software is developed securely using secure coding guidelines, developer training, code review, and protection against OWASP Top 10.

controls.title: Vulnerabilities identified and addressed
controls.description: Security vulnerabilities are identified, ranked by risk (CVSS or similar), and addressed via patching with defined SLAs.

controls.title: Public-facing web apps protected
controls.description: Public-facing web applications are protected against attacks via WAF (in blocking mode) or annual application testing. Payment page scripts are inventoried and integrity-monitored (v4.0 new).

controls.title: Changes managed securely
controls.description: Changes to system components are managed via formal change control, environment separation, no live PANs in pre-prod, and post-change security verification.

controls.title: Access restricted by least privilege
controls.description: Access to system components and cardholder data is restricted based on least privilege, need-to-know, role-based assignment, and 6-monthly access reviews.

controls.title: Access control system enforcement
controls.description: An access control system is in place to restrict access to the CDE, configured to enforce least privilege with deny-by-default, and kept current.

controls.title: User IDs and credentials managed
controls.description: All users have unique IDs; shared/group/generic accounts only with documented exception; accounts managed through formal lifecycle; inactive accounts disabled within 90 days; sessions timeout after 15 minutes.

controls.title: Strong authentication established
controls.description: Strong authentication is established and managed — password length min 12 characters, complexity, 90-day expiry (where MFA not used), password history of 4, account lockout after invalid attempts.

controls.title: MFA for all CDE access (v4.0)
controls.description: MFA is implemented for ALL access into the CDE (key v4.0 change — extended from admin/remote only to all users). MFA configured to prevent bypass.

controls.title: MFA misuse prevented
controls.description: MFA systems are configured to prevent misuse — anti-replay, anti-fatigue, anti-phishing-resistant where possible.

controls.title: Physical access to facilities controlled
controls.description: Physical access controls protect facility entry and sensitive areas — badge access, visitor management, CCTV, control of network jacks and wireless devices.

controls.title: Media containing CHD secured
controls.description: Media containing cardholder data is securely stored, classified, transported (tracked courier), distributed, and destroyed (cross-cut shred for paper, secure wipe/destroy for electronic).

controls.title: POI device protection from tampering
controls.description: Point-of-interaction (POI) devices are protected from tampering and skimming through inspection programs, with documented checklists and inventory.

controls.title: Audit logs implemented
controls.description: Audit logs capture all user access to CHD, admin/root actions, access to audit logs, invalid auth attempts, authentication events, log service events, and creation/deletion of system objects.

controls.title: Audit logs protected
controls.description: Audit logs are protected from destruction and modification — immutable storage, restricted access, prompt central backup, file integrity monitoring.

controls.title: Audit logs reviewed (automated v4.0)
controls.description: Audit logs are reviewed daily to identify anomalies. Automated log review mechanisms (SIEM correlation/alerting) are used (new in v4.0). Exceptions addressed promptly.

controls.title: Log history retained 12+ months
controls.description: Audit log history is retained for at least 12 months, with the last 3 months immediately available for analysis.

controls.title: Time synchronization
controls.description: Time-synchronization technology (NTP) is used; all CDE system clocks are synchronized to a consistent time source.

controls.title: Critical security control failures detected (v4.0)
controls.description: Failures of critical security controls (AV, FW, IDS/IPS, audit logging, etc.) are detected, alerted on, and addressed promptly (new in v4.0).

controls.title: Wireless access points managed
controls.description: Authorized and unauthorized wireless access points are managed through quarterly scans and rogue AP detection, reconciled against the AP inventory.

controls.title: Vulnerability scans performed
controls.description: Internal and external vulnerability scans are performed at least quarterly; external scans by an ASV; all exploitable vulnerabilities remediated and re-scanned until passing.

controls.title: Penetration testing performed
controls.description: External and internal penetration testing is performed at least annually and after significant changes. Network segmentation is verified by pen testing every 6 months.

controls.title: IDS/IPS and change detection deployed
controls.description: Intrusion detection and/or prevention is deployed at CDE perimeter and critical points. Change detection (FIM) monitors critical files in CDE.

controls.title: Payment page change/tamper detection (v4.0)
controls.description: Change and tamper detection mechanism for payment pages monitors and alerts on unauthorized modifications to payment page contents/scripts (new in v4.0).

controls.title: Information security policy maintained
controls.description: A comprehensive information security policy is defined, published, communicated, and reviewed at least annually with management approval.

controls.title: Risks to CHD managed via TRA
controls.description: Targeted Risk Analysis (TRA) is performed for flexible-frequency requirements and customised approach controls; cryptographic algorithms and technologies reviewed annually.

controls.title: PCI DSS scope documented and validated
controls.description: PCI DSS scope is documented; in-scope inventory maintained; scope verified at least annually and after major changes.

controls.title: Security awareness program
controls.description: A security awareness program is implemented; reviewed annually; personnel acknowledge security policy at least annually.

controls.title: Personnel screening
controls.description: Personnel are screened (background checks where permitted by law) before being granted access to the CDE.

controls.title: TPSP management
controls.description: Third-party service providers with CHD access are inventoried; bound by written agreements acknowledging PCI DSS responsibility; due diligence performed; annual compliance status monitored; responsibility matrix maintained.

controls.title: Incident response plan and testing
controls.description: Incident response plan is documented, tested annually, with designated 24/7 personnel, trained team, alert integration, and procedures for unexpected PAN discovery.
